lints.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
lints.detail: Function `public.update_reservation_notifications_updated_at()` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/update_reservation_notifications_updated_at`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

lints.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
lints.detail: Function `public.validate_shift_requests_clinic_refs()` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/validate_shift_requests_clinic_refs`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

lints.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable

lints.detail: Function `public.update_reservation_notifications_updated_at()` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/update_reservation_notifications_updated_at`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

lints.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
lints.title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
lints.detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.
